name: Mass Production
tagline: go-wide token swarm (doublers + Ojer Taq) -> any Overrun-class pump alphas the table (redundant pieces, one mechanism: combat)
idea: The deck exploits creature tokens as a fungible resource and multiplies it.

briefKills.line: any of 4 redundant pumps: Jazal Goldmane / Blossoming Bogbeast / Salvation Colossus / Elesh Norn → team +X/+X (Jazal quadratic) -> one-turn alpha over the swarm
Legion Loyalty (all creatures have myriad) → every attacker replicates at each opponent -> the alpha hits the whole table at once

openings: Weakest axis — Durability (3/5): the judges' soft spot.
Swarm-gated: keep wants land + an early token maker; finishers are redundant, any one keeps.
Tables (all three) never-close 4% of the time.

clock.src: lab mp_clock_lab @20k on mass-production-owned-20260717.txt (go-wide swarm; Akroma swap 2026-07-17)
clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T7; the full table around T10.

gamePlan: The deck exploits **creature tokens as a fungible resource** and multiplies it. Twenty token producers — mass spells (Hop to It, Battle Screech, Awaken the Woods, Decree of Justice, Forth Eorlingas!, The Crystal's Chosen, Gather the White Lotus) and per-turn engines (Scute Swarm, Rampaging Baloths, Felidar Retreat, God-Eternal Oketra, Hanweir Garrison, Tendershoot-class drips) — feed three token **doublers** (Doubling Season, Parallel Lives, Elspeth Storm Slayer) and the **Ojer Taq tripler**, which stack multiplicatively. Baylen converts the wide board into mana and cards; Cathars' Crusade, Rosie Cotton, Elesh Norn and the counter-doublers convert it into stats; a redundant Overrun cluster (Blossoming Bogbeast, Legion Loyalty, Jazal Goldmane, Salvation Colossus) converts it into a one-turn table swing. It is a fast, smooth, rebuildable swarm — measured, not hoped: decap T7 / table T10, 1.88 mean dead turns, +2 turns to recover from a wrath.
winLine: go-wide token swarm (doublers + Ojer Taq) -> any Overrun-class pump alphas the table (redundant pieces, one mechanism: combat)

finishers.name: Overrun alpha
finishers.note: Go wide, then swing with a pump: **Jazal Goldmane** ({3}{W}{W}: attackers +X/+X where X = attacker count — quadratic), **Blossoming Bogbeast** (attack trigger: team trample +X/+X), **Salvation Colossus** (+2/+2 + indestructible on attack), or **Elesh Norn** (+2/+2 / opponents −2/−2, strips their token blockers).

finishers.name: Myriad table-wide
finishers.note: All creatures gain myriad — each attacker replicates at *every* opponent, so one alpha hits the whole table at once instead of focus-firing.

finishers.name: ETB burn chip
finishers.tag: Colossus of the Blood Age × Twinflame Tyrant
finishers.note: Colossus ETBs for 3 to each opponent, **doubled to 6 by Twinflame Tyrant**; Twinflame also doubles all combat damage.

rulings.name: Baylen's mana ability
rulings.note: a mana ability (no stack, no response window), and tokens that entered this turn can be tapped. Tapping tokens for mana/cards removes them from combat — decide before attacks.

rulings.name: Ojer Taq
rulings.note: triples creature tokens only, multiplicatively with the doublers (Doubling Season ×2 → Ojer Taq ×3 = ×6). Awaken the Woods' Dryads are creature tokens — multiplied. When it dies it returns transformed as a land and can flip back.

rulings.name: Legion Loyalty
rulings.note: myriad copies enter tapped and attacking each other opponent and are exiled at end of combat — they never stay, and they're still blockable; myriad spreads the alpha, it doesn't evade.

rulings.name: Blossoming Bogbeast
rulings.note: X = life gained this turn; its own attack trigger banks 2 first, so the floor is team +2/+2 + trample every attack.

rulings.name: Elesh Norn
rulings.note: only opponents' creatures get −2/−2; she erases their 2-toughness blockers (and opposing token swarms) while pumping ours.

rulings.name: The Crystal's Chosen / Cathars' Crusade counters
rulings.note: doubled by Branching Evolution / The Earth Crystal / Doubling Season; counters put on entering creatures count as "put" for the doublers.

rulings.name: Akroma's Will
rulings.note: controlling any commander as you cast it lets you choose both modes; once announced, opponents cannot respond before modes are locked. Indestructible + protection from each color blanks nearly every wrath; flying + double strike is usually lethal math on an already-wide board.

rulings.name: Akroma's Memorial
rulings.note: protection from red prevents red damage sources: Blasphemous Act does nothing to your team. Haste means Ojer-multiplied token batches attack the turn they enter. It grants no stats — it converts width to speed, not size.

rulings.name: Ilysian Caryatid
rulings.note: taps for two of any one color while you control a power-4 creature; Baylen (4/3) turns it on by himself.

rulings.name: Stroke of Midnight
rulings.note: any nonland permanent, instant speed; their 1/1 Human consolation token is irrelevant here.

keep.mixed: swarm-gated: keep wants land + an early token maker; finishers are redundant, any one keeps

mull.strategy: Keep 2–5 lands with an early play that builds toward the commander. Swarm-gated: keep wants land + an early token maker; finishers are redundant, any one keeps.

killTree.title: Mass Production — Baylen, the Haymaker
killTree.root:
Naya go-wide tokens — 22 makers feed 3 token doublers + Ojer Taq's tripler (multiplicative)
Baylen converts the wide board into mana (tap 2) and cards (tap 3)
killTree.stall:
develop the swarm and tap tokens with Baylen for gas; hold Heroic Intervention / Flawless Maneuver
once presenting lethal (wrath costs a measured +2-3 turns); race walls early — never grind into a flying board
killTree.caption: cheapest line first · fall to the next

background.need:
a wide token board (doubler online)
+ Baylen tapping surplus tokens for mana/cards
background.kill: swarm width -> mana, cards, and a lethal alpha

lines.need:
any of 4 redundant pumps: Jazal Goldmane / Blossoming Bogbeast
/ Salvation Colossus / Elesh Norn
lines.kill: team +X/+X (Jazal quadratic) -> one-turn alpha over the swarm
every attacker replicates at each opponent -> the alpha hits the whole table at once

lines.need:
Colossus of the Blood Age ETB x Twinflame Tyrant
(3 -> 6 to each opponent; Twinflame also doubles combat)
lines.kill: the only board-independent damage — chip, not a standalone kill

axisGloss.BOARD: deploy the commander ~on curve + have an early (cmc≤3) play
